description:
The image captures a tranquil indoor setting at night. A man, clad in a vibrant yellow sweater, is engrossed in his work on a laptop. He's comfortably seated at a desk, which is positioned against a wall adorned with two windows. The window on the left opens up to a balcony, while the one on the right reveals a glimpse of an orange sky.

The room itself exudes a cool ambiance with its white walls and floor. A green curtain adds a pop of color in the background, complementing the man's yellow sweater. On his desk, there are two objects - a black mug and a blue water bottle, perhaps indicating his preference for both caffeinated and hydrating beverages.

The image is taken from an angle that places the viewer behind the man, offering a view of his back as he faces away from us. This perspective adds depth to the scene, inviting us into this quiet moment of focus and concentration.
